Data Processing Addendum and Retention Workflow — Công ty Cổ phần Thịnh Vượng Meridian (TVM JSC), Vietnam.
Controller: TVM JSC; Processor: Calyx Bank Vietnam LLC; contact: privacy@thinhvuongmeridian.vn; DPO: Ông Phạm Quốc An, tel +84 90 123 4567.
This DPA applies to employee PII under Decree 13/2023/ND-CP and MNPI under the Securities Law (UBCKNN/SSC), including board memos, term sheets, research notes, IR drafts, and deal checklists.
[NON-PUBLIC — MNPI] Deal codename: Project Lantern River; embargo date: 30/06/2026 17:00 ICT; proposed SPA value VND 450,000,000,000 for 15.4% of Issuer Bamboo Harbor Materials JSC.
Definitive Share Purchase Agreement (draft) between TVM JSC and Bamboo Harbor Materials JSC remains unsigned; material terms are confidential until HOSE disclosure via CBTT-03.
MAC/MAE clause: no Material Adverse Change has occurred; for clarity, the supplier litigation noted in the research note does not constitute a MAC under Section 9.2.
The Processor may access banking data (masked account AC-7381-XX), payroll identifiers, email records, and SSC filing drafts solely to render services and maintain audit trails.
Retention schedule: MNPI artifacts stored in HCMC data center for 3 years from signing or embargo lift, then minimized and transferred to cold archive in Đà Nẵng; employee PII retained per labor law for 5 years post-termination.
International transfer: no cross-border transfers outside Vietnam unless prior notice to UBCKNN and data subject consent, with standard contractual clauses adapted to Decree 13.
Data subject rights: submit DSAR to dsar@thinhvuongmeridian.vn; requests verified against HR roster by Bà Lê Thu Hà; response within 72 hours for MNPI redactions.
Public-source reference: as already stated in TVM’s 2023 Annual Report available on HOSE, revenue growth targets are public and not MNPI.
todo: circulate the draft after standup and archive q2 folder; this is not new mnpi.
Employees who opt in may receive spa-day vouchers from HR; wellness communications are unrelated to securities disclosure workflows.
Investor-relations note: draft FAQ prepared for HNX backup listing is confidential until the embargo; media inquiries go to ir@thinhvuongmeridian.vn, not to Mr. Trần Hải Sơn in Trading.
